mapper.select: /* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.file.FileMapper.selectTbFilesByFormUuid Description : FormUuid로 파일리스트 조회 작성자 : 김동식 */ SELECT * FROM TB_FILE WHERE FORM_UUID = #{formUuid} AND (DEL_YN IS NULL OR DEL_YN = 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_FILE SET DEL_YN = #{delYn} WHERE FILE_SN = #{fileSn}
mapper.select: -- com.kdt.KDT_PJT.cmmn.map.CmmnMap SELECT FILE_SN AS fileSn , ORGNL_FILE_NM AS orgnlFileNm , STRG_FILE_NM AS strgFileNm , FILE_SZ AS size , FORM_UUID AS formUuid FROM TB_FILE WHERE FORM_UUID = #{formUuid} ORDER BY FILE_SN ASC
SELECT FILE_SN AS fileSn, ORGNL_FILE_NM AS orgnlFileNm FROM TB_FILE WHERE FORM_UUID = #{formUuid} ORDER BY FILE_SN ASC
